scope_comment: Mutation testing for the highest-stakes pure logic in @goldfinch/shared
(PHASE7-DECISIONS.md P7-10): money, keys, dates, cursor, recurrence,
rules, budgetMath, csv; plus accountTypes (P8-4 effective-type
(the API_ROUTES manifest is locked by the infra parity test), types/
(erased at runtime), internal/sha256.ts (locked by FIPS vectors in
csv.test.ts; mutating a hash primitive only proves hashes change).
runner_comment: This workspace tests with node:test (npm test = tsc + node --test), so we
use the tap runner: it executes each compiled test file with `node` and
parses the TAP stream node:test emits. buildCommand compiles the
instrumented sandbox once (mutant switching does the rest); see
tsconfig.stryker.json for why that build skips type checking.
sandbox_comment: tsconfig.json/tsconfig.test.json are excluded from the sandbox on purpose:
they extend ../../tsconfig.base.json (outside the sandbox), and their
presence triggers Stryker's tsconfig preprocessor, which dynamically
imports 'typescript' from the npx install tree where it is not present.
The sandbox build only ever uses the self-contained tsconfig.stryker.json.
